Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Hoshino Tech KK (TSE Growth) — 2026-05-31
To: Board and ELT; cc: Ms. Aya Kondo, Mr. Sho Tanabe; Re: TOB planning, APPI/My Number handling, blackout controls
The contemplated tender offer for Sakura Robotics KK remains non-public; under F I E A Art. 167/168 this is an enumerated material fact, subject to the Fair Disclosure Rule and our 適時開示 obligations.
Upon Board approval, TSE Timely Disclosure via TDnet must occur “without delay” (generally within 30 minutes); draft release and EDINET narrative are prepared (no selective disclosure to third parties before TDnet).
A blackout window is in effect for directors, officers, and designated employees from 2026-06-05 through the close of trading on 2026-06-21 due to the TOB discussion and upcoming 1Q results silent period.
Although the indicative consideration (~0.8% of consolidated assets) is quantitatively small, the strategic pivot renders this issuer‑relative material; treat all deal terms as MNPI until TDnet/EDINET publication.
APPI/My Number: HR must not transmit 個人番号 via email or chat; for RSU settlement and payroll withholding use the secure vendor portal only; Ms. Kondo’s sample 個人番号 appears as 1 9 8 4 - 0 3 - 7 6 2 1 - 5 0 (redact if stored).
Contact channels: compliance@hoshinotech.co.jp; legal@hoshinotech.co.jp; for HR workflows: mori.kenji@hoshinotech.co.jp; do not forward any spreadsheets containing individual codes.
Public-status precision: FY2025 earnings were already announced on TDnet (T D n e t — 2 0 2 6 / 0 5 / 1 0 16:30 JST) and filed on EDINET (E D I N E T コード: E9-HT-0510); see http://ir.hoshinotech.co.jp/notice?doc=TD2026-0510#page=2 — this is public, not MNPI.
The 2023 press release about office relocation and the Hoshino Cloud Gate product roadmap posted on our website are stale/public and should not be treated as inside information.
Negative note: the draft SPA’s material adverse change clause is not triggered; Watanabe Gears GK’s temporary plant downtime is a non-issuer operational update and does not affect our disclosure obligations.
Selective disclosure control: the 1:1 with Ohori Capital Advisors GK on 2026-06-12 must use only previously disclosed information; provide the July IR deck and avoid any tender-offer facts not yet on TDnet.
Employee equity workflow: option grants to Mr. Sho Tanabe and others must be approved post‑announcement; pre‑clearance is required and trading logs will be maintained by IR per our Insider Trading Policy.
Obfuscation and internal refs: project A Q U A - 4 2; account ref 00–19xx–HT**–7; TOB codename “Shirakawa”; do not attach spreadsheets containing “My No.” columns or broken OCR extracts.
For questions on FIEA compliance and TSE timely disclosure, please contact Ms. Kondo (aya.kondo@hoshinotech.co.jp) or the Legal team; generic policy text is in the Code of Conduct and Insider Manual.
